description: Verify description validation: agent rejects a first-person description and asks for a third-person rewrite

turns.user_input: I check project dependencies for outdated packages and security vulnerabilities. Use me when you want to audit dependencies.

expected_behavior: Rejects the first-person description that begins with 'I check'
Explains that skill descriptions must be written in third person
Asks the user to rewrite the description in third person before continuing
forbidden_behavior: Accepts the first-person description and continues gathering without raising a validation error
